cmd:
sed -i 's|const current = await client.get(COUNTER_KEY);|// const current = await client.get(COUNTER_KEY);|' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i 's|const value = parseInt(current || "0", 10);|const newValue = await client.incr(COUNTER_KEY);|' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i 's|const newValue = value + 1;|const value = newValue - 1;|' /app/app/counter.js
sed -i 's|await client.set(COUNTER_KEY, newValue.toString());|logger.debug(`Counter incremented: ${value} -> ${newValue}`);|' /app/app/counter.js
